questionHtml:
Which compounds belong to the same homologous series?

A.     CHCCH2CH3, CHCCH2CH2CH3

B.     CH3CH2CH2CH2OH, CH3CH2OCH2CH3

C.     CH2CHCH3, CH3CH2CH2CH3

D.     CH3COCH3, CH3CH2OCH3

meta.title: Which compounds belong to the same homologous series? A. CHCCH2CH3, CHCCH2CH2CH3 B. CH3CH2CH2CH2OH, CH3CH2OCH2CH3 C. CH2CHCH3, CH3CH2CH2CH3 D. CH3COCH3, CH3CH2OCH3
